text.title: Python Ecosystem Practices Procedure
text.summary: 7-step procedure to apply the practices-python-ecosystem methodology end-to-end.

step.name: init-pyproject
step.action: Write pyproject.toml with [project] table (name, version, requires-python, dependencies) and [build-system] table.

step.name: src-layout
step.action: Create src/<package>/__init__.py; place tests/ at repo root next to src/.

step.name: lockfile
step.action: Run uv lock (or pip-compile requirements.in). Commit the resulting lockfile.

step.name: pre-commit
step.action: Write .pre-commit-config.yaml running ruff check, ruff format, mypy on staged files. Run pre-commit install.

step.name: ci
step.action: Write CI workflow: install, ruff check, mypy, pytest -q. Each step failing fails the job.
